---
title: "Designing a Collaborative or Network for Success"
author: "Designing & Leading Collaboratives and Networks Series"
description: "Description TBD"
categories:
    - TBD
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: false
---

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/lead-collabs/content/success-design.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/lead-collabs/content/success-design.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
